task_completion.description: Verify the product name and SKU are entered correctly for a Grouped Product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Home Gym Starter Kit' in the Product Name field and 'HOMEGYM-KIT-001' in the SKU field. The page title or product type indicator should show it is a 'Grouped Product'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is enabled and visibility is set to Catalog, Search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Enable Product' toggle set to the 'Yes' position. Look for the 'Visibility' dropdown set to 'Catalog, Search'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is assigned to the 'Sports' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sports' selected or displayed as a tag in the 'Categories' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Yoga Mat Premium is added to the grouped products with a default quantity of 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Grouped Products' section at the bottom of the form, look for 'Yoga Mat Premium' (or SKU 'YOGA-001') in the grid with '1' entered in its 'Default Qty' column.

task_completion.description: Verify the Insulated Water Bottle is added to the grouped products with a default quantity of 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Grouped Products' section, look for 'Insulated Water Bottle' (or SKU 'BOTTLE-001') in the grid with '2' entered in its 'Default Qty' column.

task_completion.description: Verify the Classic Cotton T-Shirt is added to the grouped products with a default quantity of 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Grouped Products' section, look for 'Classic Cotton T-Shirt' (or SKU 'TSHIRT-001') in the grid with '1' entered in its 'Default Qty' column.

task_completion.description: Verify the grouped product was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green success message banner stating 'You saved the product.' at the top of the Magento admin panel, or the product appearing in the main Catalog Products grid.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin web interface being navigated and filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The environment must clearly be a web browser displaying the Magento backend, not a text editor like Notepad or nano.

integrity.description: Verify the success state appears genuine and not manipulated via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look consistent with standard Magento styling. There should be no open browser developer tools modifying the DOM to fake a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 'Grouped Product' in Magento. Expected Name: 'Home Gym Starter Kit'. Expected SKU: 'HOMEGYM-KIT-001'. Expected Category: 'Sports'. The grouped product must contain exactly three child products with specific default quantities: YOGA-001 (Yoga Mat Premium) qty 1, BOTTLE-001 (Insulated Water Bottle) qty 2, and TSHIRT-001 (Classic Cotton T-Shirt) qty 1.
